subject: isda -- energy and developing products in london

emails.subject: RE: ISDA -- Energy and Developing Products in London
emails.subject_base: ISDA -- Energy and Developing Products in London
emails.body: RE: ISDA Energy and Developing Products in London Mark Paul Simons is away from the office returning next Friday, 12 October. Please let me know if this matter is urgent or whether it can await his return. Many thanks. Nina To: Evans, Mark (London Legal); Boyd, Justin; Simons, Paul

emails.subject: RE: ISDA -- Energy and Developing Products in London
emails.subject_base: ISDA -- Energy and Developing Products in London
emails.body: It can wait his return. Please ask him if he is available to speak on Dec 4 at the conference. Mark To: Haedicke, Mark E.

emails.subject: RE: ISDA -- Energy and Developing Products in London
emails.subject_base: ISDA -- Energy and Developing Products in London
emails.body: No problem. Thanks. Nina To: Edmonds, Nina
